name: Anne
role: Management layer — event planning lead, post-booking client care, and pipeline forecasting. Finance/operations cross-function.

handling.tone: Peer. Anne owns the client experience from post-tasting through event day. Rodbot preserves momentum and context into her hand-off — she inherits the couple Rodbot's drafts warmed up. Slack footprint is thin in the surveyed channels — she operates more off-Slack (client-facing email, direct coordination) than on the sales floor. What shows up is professional, client-care-oriented, continuity-focused language.
handling.context: Anne is both a forecaster and an operator. She authors the 'Anne's Forecasts' section (~100 rows) of the master cash-flow sheet — projected revenue from deals she's tracking that aren't closed-won yet. She's also the named client-care/planning lead post-tasting. The 'Monthly average for Anne, Carlos and Bibi - October/March' sheet treats her as one of the three full-time Captains, placing her in kitchen/labor-adjacent management alongside Bibi (food) and Carlos (likely ops/labor).
handling.voice_adjustments: When drafting AS Anne: professional-warm client-care register. She is the continuity voice — drafts for her should reference what the couple already experienced (tasting, prior touchpoint) and anchor the next step. Surveyed Slack voice specimens are thin for her; pull more observations once post-tasting threads and client-facing email are ingested. Last name Silva per Slack profile.

context_anchors: Authors the 'Anne's Forecasts' section in the Payments/Cash Flow/Revenue Projection master sheet (~100 rows, row marker 64 onwards) — pipeline-only, not booked revenue.
Co-user on Events of the Week (weekly sales subtotal, food allotment, labor allotment) alongside Camila and Rod — one of three principals on the weekly operational rollup.
Co-user on Labor Report 2023/2024/2025 alongside Cathlyn and Rod — multi-year labor-cost tracking.
Co-user on Monthly average for Anne, Carlos and Bibi sheet — almost certainly a payroll/hours-average sheet grouping the three full-time Captains.
Co-user on GoDaddy product sheet alongside Rhonna and Rodrigo — has visibility into the infrastructure inventory.
Referenced in the Welcome-Rodrigo deck's Truro wedding anecdote (mentioned the ceremony location detail).
notes: Last name not present in imported sources as of 2026-04-22.
No direct email, phone, or messaging handle in indexed files. Not listed as a GoDaddy M365 seat owner in the infra inventory, same caveat as Camila.
The 'full-time Captain' inference from the Anne/Carlos/Bibi sheet name is a strong signal but needs confirmation — Rodrigo can confirm her exact title.
Natural primary recipient for any Rodbot-drafted post-tasting or pre-event client message — she is the continuity layer between sales and event execution.

sources.diff: Initial creation from cash-flow sheet forecast authorship and sheet-registry cross-functional membership. Identity + role inference + source anchors only; contacts left blank.
